title: Joe and Michael Catch-up
summary: Joe Furnari and Michael Donovan discussed Vinnie's emotionally volatile management style and low emotional intelligence, noting that Vinnie has fired them multiple times, and addressed workflow challenges, including a Perplexity payment issue that Michael Donovan temporarily resolved. The participants discussed difficulties with content strategy due to Vinnie's inconsistent feedback, excessive content requests, and lack of interest in tracking, with Joe Furnari advising Michael Donovan to balance tool development with immediate production to satisfy Vinnie's impatience.

decisions.description: Michael Donovan temporarily paid $40 for Perplexity to resolve lockout.

actionItems.task: Work with Mindy to migrate Google and other accounts to corporate card.
